fact_nuggets.text: Propeller Tail (Japanese: Screw Tailfin) is an Ability introduced in Generation VIII. It is the signature Ability of Arrokuda and Barraskewda.
Signature Ability of Arrokuda And Barraskewda

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Propeller Tail makes its user's moves ignore the target-redirecting effects of moves (e.g. Rage Powder , Follow Me , and Ally Switch ) and Abilities (e.g. Storm Drain and Lightning Rod ). Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Propeller Tail has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] Propeller Tail makes its user's moves ignore the target-redirecting effects of moves (e.g. Rage Powder , Follow Me , and Ally Switch ) and Abilities (e.g. Storm Drain and Lightning Rod ).
Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.
